title: Add policy configuration data structures, construction and parsing
body:
There are a few outstanding FIXMEs, but otherwise this should be pretty feature-complete, if anyone wanted to review this now.

Depends on / includes #54, I will rebase as necessary.

comments.body: There is nothing special in here; just a fair amount of careful parsing, and tests for it.
This needs a rebase - LGTM though, will merge after rebase
Thanks, for the review, I’d rather wait with merging until the implementation lands as well, in case I have missed something.

Updated: added validation of Docker Reference strings (keys in `Policy.Specific`, and references in `NewPRMExactReference` and `NewPRMExactRepository`. No further changes expected to this in the near future.
Sorry, a few more comment changes still pending.
LGTM again, I like all the tests around this also, tell me if this is mergeable and I'll merge
Yes, this is mergeable. Merging to save a round-trip. Thanks for the review!
